test.create_query: CREATE TABLE large ( a Int32, b Int32, x String, y String, z String )
CREATE TABLE small ( a Int32, b Int32 )
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO large SELECT r, r, randomPrintableASCII(10), randomPrintableASCII(10), randomPrintableASCII(10) FROM (SELECT randUniform(1, 100000000) AS r FROM numbers(100000000))
INSERT INTO small SELECT a, a FROM large ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 10000000
test.query: SELECT count(*) FROM large l INNER JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a WHERE s.b < 10000000 SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM large l INNER JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a WHERE s.b < 10000000 SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters = 1
SELECT count(*) FROM large l INNER JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a WHERE s.b < 10000000 AND l.b BETWEEN 1 AND 9999997 SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM large l INNER JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a WHERE s.b < 10000000 AND l.b BETWEEN 1 AND 9999997 SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters = 1
